CAPABILITY-BOUNDARY-01.consequence: A receiver can still read private paths, receipts, inherited descriptors, /proc data, environment values, shared memory, or private symbols and fabricate features.
CAPABILITY-BOUNDARY-01.mechanism: Receiver separation is stated as a policy or generic separate executable, but not as an exact OS-enforced deny matrix over the deployed image.
CAPABILITY-BOUNDARY-01.minimal_repair: Freeze a receiver capability manifest requiring a distinct receiver executable and OS-enforced namespace/UID/mount/FD/proc/env/shared-memory denial; require negative-access regressions before decoding.
CAPABILITY-BOUNDARY-01.required_regression: The actual deployed receiver must fail to open private maps, source receipts, module private files, inherited descriptors, /proc private paths, private environment values, shared memory, and private source symbols.

CLAIM-CEILING-01.consequence: A first two-replicate package could be misread as a Wall crossing despite the corrected acceptance law.
CLAIM-CEILING-01.mechanism: The draft successor law prohibited two-replicate promotion, but SMALL_WALL_STATE.md still carried stale predecessor promotion language.
CLAIM-CEILING-01.minimal_repair: Update SMALL_WALL_STATE.md to make SMALL_WALL_CROSSED_NOT_PROMOTED unconditional for every first two-replicate package and require a separate multi-seed/session/route/scaling/reproduction evaluator.
CLAIM-CEILING-01.required_regression: A perfect first two-replicate result remains SMALL_WALL_CROSSED_NOT_PROMOTED.

EXACT-COVERAGE-01.consequence: A diagonal subset, missing replicate, missing control arm, or runtime regrouping can preserve marginal sets while omitting required evidence or changing physical order.
EXACT-COVERAGE-01.mechanism: Exact coverage lists marginal sets, but not one machine-readable expected tuple multiset with exact cardinalities, multiplicities, routes, banks, control arms, restoration arms, and executed order.
EXACT-COVERAGE-01.minimal_repair: Freeze one expected tuple multiset and one global event sequence consumed directly by classification; compare schedule, raw capture, query receipts, source receipts, restoration rows, features, and copy-back identities before decoding.
EXACT-COVERAGE-01.required_regression: Omit a replicate, omit a query-control cell, submit a diagonal subset, duplicate an ID, add an unknown ID, or regroup execution order and assert hard rejection before classification.

GATE-REGISTRY-01.consequence: The successor could repeat V1's computed-but-not-hard-gated failure class.
GATE-REGISTRY-01.mechanism: Control matrix, implementation requirements, and candidate-class wording contained different mandatory gate sets.
GATE-REGISTRY-01.minimal_repair: Create one authoritative mandatory-gate registry consumed directly by classification, including scalar adversary, exact coverage, receiver capability, all controls, near-zero law, bank reversal, R2, and custody closure.
GATE-REGISTRY-01.required_regression: A missing query-scramble, schedule-null, receiver-capability, restoration-negative, or bank-reversal gate prevents candidate classification.

METRIC-DOMAINS-01.consequence: The future adjudicator could reuse malformed V1-style floors or omit absolute/SNR, complex norm, phase, or quadrature controls.
METRIC-DOMAINS-01.mechanism: Metric names are separated, but equations, denominators, equivalence margins, calibration populations, multiplicity, thresholds, and quadrature coverage are not frozen.
METRIC-DOMAINS-01.minimal_repair: Define formulas, units, denominators, zero behavior, calibration population, threshold provenance, multiplicity law, absolute/SNR floors, complex vector norms, angular gates, estimator-matched null bounds, and independent bank-resolved reversal.
METRIC-DOMAINS-01.required_regression: Known V1 low-gain/null, 39:1 gain, anisotropic quadrature, and raw-leg/decoded-null mismatch counterexamples fail named gates.

NONSEPARABILITY-01.consequence: The design can pass with two additive branch-local states sharing addresses, not one unresolved relational process-object.
NONSEPARABILITY-01.mechanism: The draft asserted shared topology but did not freeze a measurable joint-state or nonseparability law.
NONSEPARABILITY-01.minimal_repair: Freeze a joint-interaction observable such as J_q = Y_q(a,b) - Y_q(a,empty) - Y_q(empty,b) + Y_q(empty,empty), require predicted nonzero shared-topology response, and require separated-topology and cross-pair controls null.
NONSEPARABILITY-01.required_regression: Synthetic additive branch-lane data and separable topology data fail the joint nonseparability gate while a declared accessor-specific synthetic effect passes.

PHYSICAL-MECHANISM-01.consequence: Candidate B is not implementable as a frozen physical experiment and cannot be reviewed for carrier false positives.
PHYSICAL-MECHANISM-01.mechanism: The draft did not freeze exact physical addresses/pages, cache sets, banks, cores, ownership states, state lifetime, source encoder P(R), query action Q, observable h(P(R),q), or restoration map.
PHYSICAL-MECHANISM-01.minimal_repair: Freeze exact preparation, handoff, query, restoration, branch-local marginals, pair topology mutation, physical trace equivalence, and manipulated physical degree of freedom.
PHYSICAL-MECHANISM-01.required_regression: A relation mutation that changes only route, bank, cache-set conflict, alias topology, or probe order fails ordinary-explanation controls.

QUERY-CHOOSER-01.consequence: A controller can preselect the query and publish it later, or select measurement windows after peeking.
QUERY-CHOOSER-01.mechanism: Delayed publication is not proven delayed choice; no independent high-entropy chooser, monotonic commitment, source-death attestation, or pre-measurement window seal is frozen.
QUERY-CHOOSER-01.minimal_repair: Generate the query through an independent high-entropy chooser only after attested source death and capability revocation; seal query, operator, order, and windows before carrier measurement.
QUERY-CHOOSER-01.required_regression: Preselected query, shared PRNG state, source-visible query seed, and post-measurement window choice all classify custody-invalid.

RESTORATION-R2-01.consequence: Natural relaxation, destructive probes, global reset, or insensitive observables can produce false restoration.
RESTORATION-R2-01.mechanism: R2 was a checklist, not a concrete equivalence contract with forward displacement, standardized readout, baseline distribution, equivalence region, confidence law, and negative controls.
RESTORATION-R2-01.minimal_repair: Define R2 as forward displacement plus confidence-bound equivalence to baseline over a frozen independent state vector, with natural-relaxation, time-matched no-op, no-restoration, wrong-inverse, reordered-inverse, and carrier-off controls.
RESTORATION-R2-01.required_regression: Byte-equal but physically perturbed, spontaneous-return, wrong-inverse, reordered-inverse, no-restoration, and carrier-off packets fail R2.

SCALAR-REPLAY-01.consequence: A source can precompute every response for a finite public query family and encode the complete answer vector before closure; the receiver later selects a coordinate.
SCALAR-REPLAY-01.mechanism: Query separation does not by itself reject finite-query answer-cache scalar replay; the adversary lacked realized-query input, model classes, metrics, tolerances, and held-out tests.
SCALAR-REPLAY-01.minimal_repair: Give the scalar adversary complete source view and realized query at scoring time; include finite lookup table, additive branch, nonlinear workload, bank, route, order, timing, and total-work models with held-out relation/query/seed/session tests.
SCALAR-REPLAY-01.required_regression: Pure scalar/query-table synthetic data fails named gates and accessor-specific synthetic data passes.

VALUE-ORIENTATION-01.consequence: A value-derived orientation such as min(a,N-a) to bank A and max(a,N-a) to bank B survives label swap while leaking branch orientation.
VALUE-ORIENTATION-01.mechanism: Label-name swapping does not prove physical label invariance when physical branch-to-lane assignment can be derived from values or metadata.
VALUE-ORIENTATION-01.minimal_repair: Replace label-name swap with blinded physical branch-to-lane permutation, prohibit value-based canonical orientation, and require full receiver-visible metadata exchangeability.
VALUE-ORIENTATION-01.required_regression: Value-derived lane assignment, route assignment, bank assignment, and metadata row-shape dictionaries fail label-invariance and opaque-ID gates.

surviving_direction: Candidate B remains a plausible research direction only after repair.
